advanced/custom-calendar-system.title: Custom Calendar System
advanced/custom-calendar-system.description: Implement your own calendar system by creating a CalendarSystem adapter. This guide walks through creating an Ethiopian calendar system as an example.

advanced/performance-optimization.title: Performance Optimization
advanced/performance-optimization.description: react-native-fast-calendar is designed for high performance. This guide explains how to maintain optimal performance in your implementation.

advanced/testing.title: Testing
advanced/testing.description: Testing calendar components requires special consideration for date manipulation and user interactions.

components/calendar-daycell.title: Calendar.DayCell
components/calendar-daycell.description: `` is the default day cell implementation. It's a memoized component that renders a single day with selection, range, and today indicators.

components/calendar-daygrid.title: Calendar.DayGrid
components/calendar-daygrid.description: `` is the only built-in visual component that renders the 6×7 day grid. It handles layout, memoization, and swipe gestures.

components/calendar-root.title: Calendar.Root
components/calendar-root.description: `` is the headless provider that owns the calendar store. It renders no visible UI itself, but provides state to all child components via hooks.

components/simple-calendar.title: SimpleCalendar
components/simple-calendar.description: The SimpleCalendar component is a batteries-included calendar for the 80% use case. It wraps the headless API into one component with sensible defaults.

core-concepts/calendar-systems.title: Calendar Systems
core-concepts/calendar-systems.description: The library has zero calendar-system dependencies in the core. Everything is abstracted through the CalendarSystem interface.

core-concepts/headless-design.title: Headless Design
core-concepts/headless-design.description: The library is headless by design — it provides the logic and state management, but you control every pixel of the UI.

core-concepts/mental-model.title: Mental Model
core-concepts/mental-model.description: Understanding how react-native-fast-calendar works internally will help you build better calendar UIs and debug issues more effectively.

core-concepts/theming.title: Theming
core-concepts/theming.description: The library uses a small, opinionated set of theme tokens. Everything is overridable via props.

hooks/use-calendar-actions.title: useCalendarActions
hooks/use-calendar-actions.description: The useCalendarActions hook provides confirm and clear actions for the calendar, along with a canConfirm flag that indicates if the current selection is valid.

hooks/use-calendar-components.title: useCalendarComponents
hooks/use-calendar-components.description: The useCalendarComponents hook provides access to the custom component slots passed to `. Use it when building custom grids that should honor the same slot overrides as the built-in DayGrid`.

hooks/use-calendar-config.title: useCalendarConfig
hooks/use-calendar-config.description: The useCalendarConfig hook provides access to the complete configuration object passed to ``. This includes theme, labels, systems, and layout settings.

hooks/use-calendar-first-day-of-week.title: useCalendarFirstDayOfWeek
hooks/use-calendar-first-day-of-week.description: The useCalendarFirstDayOfWeek hook returns the active firstDayOfWeek value from ``. Use it when building custom grids to ensure column alignment.

hooks/use-calendar-header.title: useCalendarHeader
hooks/use-calendar-header.description: The useCalendarHeader hook is a convenience compound that combines month label, year label, and navigation into a single hook. It's useful for building standard calendar headers.

hooks/use-calendar-labels.title: useCalendarLabels
hooks/use-calendar-labels.description: The useCalendarLabels hook provides access to the merged labels object. Use it to display action buttons and accessibility labels in the correct language.

hooks/use-calendar-month-label.title: useCalendarMonthLabel
hooks/use-calendar-month-label.description: The useCalendarMonthLabel hook provides the displayed month's label and controls for toggling the month picker view.

hooks/use-calendar-month-picker.title: useCalendarMonthPicker
hooks/use-calendar-month-picker.description: The useCalendarMonthPicker hook provides data and actions for building a 12-cell month chooser grid.

hooks/use-calendar-navigation.title: useCalendarNavigation
hooks/use-calendar-navigation.description: The useCalendarNavigation hook provides goPrev and goNext functions for navigating through the calendar. It's view-aware and RTL-aware.

hooks/use-calendar-selected-dates.title: useCalendarSelectedDates
hooks/use-calendar-selected-dates.description: The useCalendarSelectedDates hook returns the array of selected dates in multiple mode. In single or range mode, it returns an empty array.

hooks/use-calendar-selector.title: useCalendarSelector
hooks/use-calendar-selector.description: The useCalendarSelector hook subscribes to a specific slice of calendar state. Components only re-render when that slice changes, enabling granular performance optimization.

hooks/use-calendar-store.title: useCalendarStore
hooks/use-calendar-store.description: The useCalendarStore hook provides direct access to the CalendarStore instance. Use it for imperative operations like selecting dates, clearing selection, or navigating months.

hooks/use-calendar-system-switcher.title: useCalendarSystemSwitcher
hooks/use-calendar-system-switcher.description: The useCalendarSystemSwitcher hook provides the list of configured calendar systems, the active system ID, and a function to switch between them.

hooks/use-calendar-theme.title: useCalendarTheme
hooks/use-calendar-theme.description: The useCalendarTheme hook provides access to the merged theme object. Use it to style custom components consistently with the calendar.

hooks/use-calendar-week-numbers.title: useCalendarWeekNumbers
hooks/use-calendar-week-numbers.description: The useCalendarWeekNumbers hook returns ISO 8601 week numbers for each row of the displayed month.

hooks/use-calendar-weekday-labels.title: useCalendarWeekdayLabels
hooks/use-calendar-weekday-labels.description: The useCalendarWeekdayLabels hook returns weekday labels rotated to match the active firstDayOfWeek.

hooks/use-calendar-year-label.title: useCalendarYearLabel
hooks/use-calendar-year-label.description: The useCalendarYearLabel hook provides the displayed year label and controls for toggling the year picker view.

hooks/use-calendar-year-picker.title: useCalendarYearPicker
hooks/use-calendar-year-picker.description: The useCalendarYearPicker hook provides data and actions for building a 12-cell paginated year chooser grid.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: react-native-fast-calendar is a headless, high-performance calendar library for React Native. It provides the core logic for calendar functionality while giving you complete control over the UI.

recipes/bounded-selection.title: Bounded Selection
recipes/bounded-selection.description: Restrict date selection with minimum/maximum dates, disabled dates, and dynamic predicates.

recipes/custom-day-cell.title: Custom Day Cell
recipes/custom-day-cell.description: Customize the appearance of individual day cells for unique calendar designs.

recipes/date-range-picker.title: Date Range Picker
recipes/date-range-picker.description: Selecting a start and end date — common for hotel bookings, vacation rentals, and event planning.

recipes/flight-price-calendar.title: Flight Price Calendar
recipes/flight-price-calendar.description: A dark-themed, fare-aware date range picker — the kind of UI Skyscanner, Google Flights, and Kayak use to surface the cheapest departure / return combinations at a glance.

recipes/multi-date-picker.title: Multi-Date Picker
recipes/multi-date-picker.description: Selecting multiple individual dates — useful for booking multiple appointments, selecting event dates, or choosing available days.

recipes/multi-month-grid.title: Multi-Month Grid
recipes/multi-month-grid.description: Display multiple months side-by-side — useful for travel booking, seasonal planning, and date range selection.

recipes/single-date-picker.title: Single Date Picker
recipes/single-date-picker.description: The most basic calendar use case — selecting a single date.

recipes/vertical-list.title: Vertical List
recipes/vertical-list.description: An infinite scrolling vertical month list using @shopify/flash-list — similar to the iOS Calendar app.

recipes/week-numbers.title: Week Numbers
recipes/week-numbers.description: Display ISO 8601 week numbers alongside the calendar grid.

systems/custom-system.title: Custom Calendar System
systems/custom-system.description: You can implement any calendar system by creating a CalendarSystem adapter.

systems/gregorian.title: Gregorian Calendar System
systems/gregorian.description: The Gregorian calendar system is the default calendar system. It has zero dependencies and uses pure arithmetic for all calculations.

systems/hijri.title: Hijri Calendar System
systems/hijri.description: The Hijri (Islamic) calendar system. Requires @tabby_ai/hijri-converter or a compatible converter.

systems/jalali.title: Jalali (Persian) Calendar System
systems/jalali.description: The Jalali (Persian/Solar Hijri) calendar system. Requires moment-jalaali.

types/calendar-components.title: CalendarComponents
types/calendar-components.description: The CalendarComponents interface defines the component slots that can be customized via ``. Use these to replace visual atoms without building the full UI from scratch.

types/calendar-matcher.title: CalendarMatcher
types/calendar-matcher.description: The CalendarMatcher type defines how to match dates for disabling or modifiers. It supports three shapes: date arrays, range arrays, or predicate functions.

types/calendar-modifiers.title: CalendarModifiers
types/calendar-modifiers.description: The CalendarModifiers type is a map of named date matchers. Use it to mark dates with semantic meaning (booked, holiday, weekend) that can then be styled via DayCellInfo.modifiers.

types/calendar-root-props.title: CalendarRootProps
types/calendar-root-props.description: The CalendarRootProps interface defines all props accepted by ``.

types/calendar-selection-payload.title: CalendarSelectionPayload
types/calendar-selection-payload.description: The CalendarSelectionPayload interface is the object passed to onConfirm callbacks. It contains the selected date(s) as native JavaScript Date objects.

types/calendar-snapshot.title: CalendarSnapshot
types/calendar-snapshot.description: The CalendarSnapshot interface represents the complete state of the calendar at a point in time. It's returned by store.getSnapshot() and passed to useCalendarSelector callbacks.

types/calendar-store.title: CalendarStore
types/calendar-store.description: The CalendarStore class is the external store that manages all calendar state. It provides granular subscriptions and stable action methods.

types/calendar-system.title: CalendarSystem
types/calendar-system.description: The CalendarSystem interface is the core abstraction that enables multi-calendar support. Implement this interface to add support for any calendar system (Gregorian, Hijri, Chinese, Ethiopian, etc.).

types/calendar-theme.title: CalendarTheme
types/calendar-theme.description: The CalendarTheme interface defines all visual tokens used by the calendar. The library ships with default themes that you can customize via CalendarThemeOverride.

types/day-cell-info.title: DayCellInfo
types/day-cell-info.description: The DayCellInfo interface contains all metadata about a day cell. It's passed to custom renderDay functions and DayCell components.

types/day-cell-props.title: DayCellProps
types/day-cell-props.description: The DayCellProps interface defines all props accepted by the DayCell component.

types/day-grid-props.title: DayGridProps
types/day-grid-props.description: The DayGridProps interface defines all props accepted by ``.

types/simple-calendar-props.title: SimpleCalendarProps
types/simple-calendar-props.description: The SimpleCalendarProps interface defines all props accepted by the SimpleCalendar component.

utilities/build-month-grid.title: buildMonthGrid
utilities/build-month-grid.description: Builds a 6×7 grid of day cells for a given month.

utilities/get-year-page.title: getYearPage
utilities/get-year-page.description: Computes the 12-year page that contains a given year.

utilities/is-between.title: isBetween
utilities/is-between.description: Checks if a date falls between two endpoints (inclusive).

utilities/is-explicitly-disabled.title: isExplicitlyDisabled
utilities/is-explicitly-disabled.description: Checks if a date is disabled by explicit date lists or ranges.

utilities/iso-week-number.title: isoWeekNumber
utilities/iso-week-number.description: Computes the ISO 8601 week number for a native JavaScript Date.

utilities/match-date.title: matchDate
utilities/match-date.description: Resolves a CalendarMatcher against a single date.

utilities/rotate-weekday-labels.title: rotateWeekdayLabels
utilities/rotate-weekday-labels.description: Rotates a Sunday-first weekday array so the specified day is at index 0.

utilities/used-rows.title: usedRows
utilities/used-rows.description: Calculates how many rows in a month grid contain at least one day from the target month.
